mapper.delete: delete from cmp_fc_datasource_use_setting where code in ('system0101','system0201','system0202','system0301') and is_preset=1 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}

delete from cmp_fc_datasource_use_setting_b where mainid in (select id from cmp_fc_datasource_use_setting where code in ('system0101','system0201','system0202','system0301') and is_preset=1 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId})
mapper.select: select count(1) from cmp_fc_datasource_use_setting where code in ('system0101','system0201','system0202','system0301') and is_preset=1 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `cmp_fc_datasource_use_setting` (id,`action`, `code`, `dc_flag`, `enable`, `is_preset`, `name`,`name2`,`name3`,`name4`,`name5`,`name6`,`business_scenario`, `org`, `pubts`, `tenant_id`, `ytenant_id`) values (#{system0101},1,'system0101', NULL, '1', 1, '银行流水关联收付单据设置', 'Bank flow associated collection/payment document setting','銀行流水關聯收付單據設置',NULL,NULL,NULL, '1,2', '666666', #{pubts}, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{system0201},2,'system0201', NULL, '1', 1, '银行流水生成收付单据设置', 'Bank flow generation collection/payment document setting','銀行流水生成收付單據設置',NULL,NULL,NULL,'1', '666666', #{pubts}, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{system0202},2,'system0202', NULL, '1', 1, '认领单生成收付单据设置', 'Collection/Payment Doc Generation Setting of Claim Doc','認領單生成收付單據設置',NULL,NULL,NULL, '2', '666666', #{pubts}, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{system0301},3,'system0301', NULL, '1', 1, '业务凭据匹配关联设置', 'Business Credential Match Association Settings','業務憑據匹配關聯設置',NULL,NULL,NULL, '1,2', '666666', #{pubts}, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId});
